name: calendar
description: Read and create events on Google Calendar.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List upcoming calendar events. Use for 'what's on my calendar', 'do I have anything this week', etc.
examples: do i have any meetings today

days.description: Number of days ahead to look (default: 7, max: 30)

max_results.description: Max number of events to return (default: 10)

tools.name: find_event
tools.description: Search calendar events by keyword. Use to check if a specific meeting, appointment, or event exists.
examples: when is my meeting with sarah
do i have a doctor's appointment
find the sync with the engineering team

query.description: Search query to match against event titles and descriptions

days.description: Number of days ahead to search (default: 30)

tools.name: add_event
tools.description: Create a new calendar event. Requires title, date, and time. Always confirm with the user before calling this.
examples: add a meeting with dan for tomorrow at 2
create an event for the project kickoff

start_datetime.description: Semantic time token (e.g. 'tomorrow_1400', 'wednesday_0930', 'today_1800') OR absolute ISO 8601 string.

duration_mins.description: Duration in minutes. Defaults to 60. Example: 30, 90.

timezone.description: IANA timezone, e.g. 'America/New_York'. Defaults to America/New_York.
